meaning: n.[解]阴茎,阴蒂,[生]交接器原基(分化后则成为阴蒂或阴茎)
examples: This study provided a new tool for rapid reproduction of Amorpho- phallus.
This article makes a detailed analysis of the process of resurgence of the self-awareness of Edna, an awakening modern woman, who was distorted by Phallus culture.
Tomb (M113) yielded a variety of bronze weapons and tools, all well equipped with a lacquered wooden handle. Mention should be made of a peculiar lacquer phallus-like object.
